mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account (username, password, role, related_id, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{relatedId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_account WHERE related_id=#{relatedId} AND role=#{role}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET password=#{password} WHERE user_id=#{userId}
UPDATE user_account SET status=#{status} WHERE user_id=#{userId}
